texto: Growing up, imagination gave way to cynicism. Ignorance was traded in for world weariness. Fears remained, but they were the dull, suburban fears of illness, destitution, and death. The visceral terror of the unknown- of unseen things lurking under the bed or creeping out of the cupboard- became a fuzzy memory.
explicacao: Citação de John McNee sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Growing up, imagination gave way to cynicism. Ignorance was traded in for world weariness. Fears …” articula sucesso, adulthood, fear em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como luto e fear.
